Title: [VCST-5053] mergeCart — configurable Product sections preserved after merge (ORG_USER ← USER2)
Preconditions: Runner-native. VCST-5053 fix: cart merge MUST preserve configurable line item configuration. USER2 adds CFG_LAPTOP with UPGRADE RAM + UPGRADE Storage; ORG_USER calls mergeCart. Post-merge: configurationItems intact.
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=add_item_user2] errors[] empty
[DATA label=add_item_user2] data.addItem.itemsCount = 1
[ERRORS label=merge] errors[] empty
[DATA label=merge] data.mergeCart.itemsCount >= 1
[ERRORS label=read_back] errors[] empty
[DATA label=read_back] data.cart.items[?productId=@td(CFG_LAPTOP.id)].configurationItems[?sectionId={{SECTION_RAM_ID}}].productId = {{OPT_RAM_UPGRADE_ID}}
[DATA label=read_back] data.cart.items[?productId=@td(CFG_LAPTOP.id)].configurationItems[?sectionId={{SECTION_STORAGE_ID}}].productId = {{OPT_STORAGE_UPGRADE_ID}}
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] Both UPGRADE configItems survive merge intact. Pre-fix VCST-5053 symptom: configurationItems[] is empty or reset to defaults after merge.
Failure_Signals: configurationItems[] empty after merge (pre-fix VCST-5053 regression); configItems present but pointing to BASE options; merge errors[] non-empty; HTTP 500

Title: [VCST-5053] mergeCart — Text section customText preserved after merge
Preconditions: Runner-native. VCST-5053 fix: cart merge MUST preserve Text-section customText. USER2 adds CFG_VARIATION_CAKE with non-empty customText in optional Text section; merge to ORG_USER; assert customText survives.
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=add_item_user2] errors[] empty
[DATA label=add_item_user2] data.addItem.itemsCount = 1
[ERRORS label=merge] errors[] empty
[DATA label=merge] data.mergeCart.itemsCount >= 1
[ERRORS label=read_back] errors[] empty
[DATA label=read_back] data.cart.items[?productId=@td(CFG_VARIATION_CAKE.productId)].configurationItems[?sectionId=@td(CFG_VARIATION_CAKE.textSectionId)].customText = HelloMerge
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] customText survives merge. Pre-fix VCST-5053 symptom: customText null or absent from merged configItems.
Failure_Signals: customText null after merge; configurationItems[] empty; merge errors[] non-empty; item missing from merged cart

Title: [VCST-4936] addItem ×2 for Same SKU Accumulates Quantity to 2 (BL-CART-007)
Preconditions: Runner-native. ORG_USER. VCST-4936 BL-CART-007 verification via standard addItem mutation (not the deprecated addBulkItemsCart). Two consecutive addItem calls with same productId, qty=1 each → one lineItem with quantity=2. Pre-fix Quick Order symptom: duplicate-SKU lines in bulk-add lost second-entry quantity. This case proves the cart's quantity-accumulation invariant works at the xCart layer.
Assertions:
[ERRORS label=add_1] errors[] empty
[DATA label=add_1] data.addItem.itemsCount = 1
[ERRORS label=add_2] errors[] empty
[DATA label=add_2] data.addItem.itemsCount = 1
[ERRORS label=read_back] errors[] empty
[DATA label=read_back] data.cart.itemsCount = 1
[DATA label=read_back] data.cart.itemsQuantity = 5
Cross_Layer_Checks: [EVIDENCE] BL-CART-007: same-SKU duplicate add accumulates qty (2+3=5) on a single lineItem; itemsCount stays 1.
References: xAPI; Mutation.addItem; VCST-4936 (Quick Order regression); BL-CART-007 same-SKU merge rule
